'''lazodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avar|avar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avar|avar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lazodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzedheth|læzedheth]] || [[word:læzedhej|læzedhej]] || [[word:læzedhesh|læzedhesh]] || [[word:læzedhe|læzedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazozodhoth|lazozodhoth]] || [[word:lazozodhoj|lazozodhoj]] || [[word:lazozodhosh|lazozodhosh]] || [[word:lazozodho|lazozodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazodhoth|lazodhoth]] || [[word:lazodhoj|lazodhoj]] || [[word:lazodhosh|lazodhosh]] || [[word:lazodho|lazodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazofdhoth|lazofdhoth]] || [[word:lazofdhoj|lazofdhoj]] || [[word:lazofdhosh|lazofdhosh]] || [[word:lazofdhof|lazofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazodhotho|lazodhotho]] || [[word:lazodhojo|lazodhojo]] || [[word:lazodhosho|lazodhosho]] || [[word:lazodhoko|lazodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazodhoth|lazodhoth]] || [[word:lazodhoj|lazodhoj]] || [[word:lazodhosh|lazodhosh]] || [[word:lazodho|lazodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazodhothol|lazodhothol]] || [[word:lazodhojol|lazodhojol]] || [[word:lazodhoshol|lazodhoshol]] || [[word:lazodhokol|lazodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazodhothotho|lazodhothotho]] || [[word:lazodhojojo|lazodhojojo]] || [[word:lazodhoshosho|lazodhoshosho]] || [[word:lazodhoko|lazodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazodhothon|lazodhothon]] || [[word:lazodhojon|lazodhojon]] || [[word:lazodhoshon|lazodhoshon]] || [[word:lazodhokon|lazodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazodhothoro|lazodhothoro]] || [[word:lazodhojoro|lazodhojoro]] || [[word:lazodhoshoro|lazodhoshoro]] || [[word:lazodhokoro|lazodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
